{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Truegold dragon
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold dragon]] lunges at the [[Lady]]'s arm.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|A [[Truegold dragon]] leaps in front of the [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
